props.name: Black Envelope
props.description: Sealed envelope containing J. Baroo’s codicil. Passed around the dinner table to verify its integrity. Disappears during the blackout.
props.spoilerDetail: Hidden by the Director in The Blind Judge statue in Act 2.

props.name: Fake Envelope
props.description: Replica envelope with an incorrect wax stamp planted outside the terrace to mislead the guests.
props.spoilerDetail: Thrown through the cracked window by the Director during the blackout. Contains a fake codicil granting him control.

props.name: Cow Bell
props.description: Old service bell mounted in the dining room. One ring summons service; two rings unlock the dining wing; three rings instructs the staff to wait.
props.spoilerDetail: Players must find and attach the clapper hidden in the kitchen to ring properly.

props.name: Bell Clapper
props.description: Detachable striker for the cow bell. Without it the bell makes no sound.
props.spoilerDetail: Hidden under a tea towel or in the sink; players must search the kitchen to find it.

props.name: Crowbar
props.description: Heavy iron bar used to pry open doors or windows. Found wedged in the terrace doorframe.
props.spoilerDetail: Used by the Director in an attempted escape before discovering the wing was locked from outside.

props.name: Director’s Email
props.description: Aggressive email from the Director expressing contempt for the Son and his consulting background.
props.spoilerDetail: Reveals the Director’s true feelings and motive for blocking the Son.

props.name: Media Room Files
props.description: Collection of documents in the media room outlining motives and secrets of every character.
props.spoilerDetail: Each file provides a clue about personal pressures, red herrings, and potential motives.
